title: Native Pi TUI worker cancellation cleanup proof
goal: Prove that operator cancellation through KD daemon IPC closes the real Herdr-hosted native Pi TUI worker pane, prevents merge, and preserves cancellation evidence.
acceptance: Document a real KD native Pi TUI run cancelled through khazad-doom cancel after cockpit_worker_ready, including run id, pane id, cancel command, reason, and terminal status.
Evidence includes run_cancelled with the requested reason, absence/closure of the TUI worker pane, no accepted result after cancellation, no slice merge commit, and run status cancelled.
The proof document states what cancellation cleanup proves and does not prove.
must_ask_if: The proof would require cancelling any run not created specifically for this cancellation proof.
A worker result is accepted and merged before the cancellation command is issued.
